decks.notes: This deck focuses on quickly filling up the graveyard with powerful creatures, then bringing them back to the battlefield for a game-winning combo. Utilizing cards that manipulate the graveyard and remove opponent's threats, while also adding protection for the combo pieces. The deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with large, hard-to-deal-with creatures and out-value them with resource manipulation. By assembling the right pieces and timing the reanimation spells correctly, the deck can swing the game in its favor and secure a victory through a powerful combo.

This Boros Aggro deck focuses on dealing quick, direct damage to the opponent using efficient red spells and aggressive creatures. The deck aims to control the board early with cards like Shocking Sharpshooter and Stadium Headliner, while also pushing through damage with cards like Howlsquad Heavy and Voice of Victory. By utilizing a mix of burn spells and powerful creatures, this deck looks to overwhelm the opponent and finish the game swiftly before they can stabilize.

This deck focuses on using control cards and card draw abilities to manipulate the board and keep the opponent in check. It features a mix of bounce spells like Boomerang Basics and Get Out, along with burn spells like Burst Lightning and Sear to control the board. The deck also utilizes Eddymurk Crab and Slickshot Show-Off for creature control and card advantage. The goal is to outvalue and outlast the opponent with efficient spells and card advantage, while maintaining control of the game through strategic use of spells and abilities.

The main focus of this deck is to combo off by utilizing reanimation strategies to bring back powerful creatures from the graveyard. The deck takes advantage of cards like Doomsday Excruciator and Requiting Hex to overwhelm the opponent with big threats. Additionally, it includes various control elements such as Duress and Day of Black Sun to disrupt the opponent's game plan. By carefully planning out plays and managing resources effectively, the deck aims to outvalue the opponent and secure victory through a strong reanimation combo.

The main focus of this Izzet Control deck is to control the board through removal spells and bounce effects while utilizing card draw and cantrips to maintain hand advantage. The deck aims to stall the game, disrupt the opponent's strategy, and outvalue them in the late game. By constantly bouncing threats, countering spells, and drawing cards, the deck aims to set up powerful win conditions like Hearth Elemental and Stormchaser's Talent to seal the game. With a mix of burn spells, card draw, and disruptive elements, the deck aims to outmaneuver opponents and secure victory through careful planning and precise plays.

The main concept of this deck is to control the game by utilizing a combination of removal spells, counterspells, and card draw to disrupt the opponent's strategy. By playing defensively with cards like Abandon Attachments and Spell Pierce, and utilizing creatures like Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental for board control, the deck aims to outlast the opponent until it can bring out powerful finishers like Glacial Dragonhunt. The deck also includes a mix of burn spells like Burst Lightning and Sear for additional removal and reach.

The main focus of this Temur Aggro deck is to quickly control the board and deal damage to the opponent through aggressive creatures and burn spells. By utilizing cards like Ashling, Rekindled, Flamebraider, and Burst Lightning, the deck aims to establish board presence and pressure the opponent early on. With a mix of creatures, burn spells, and lands that provide mana fixing, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of direct damage and creature aggression to secure a swift victory.

This deck focuses on utilizing the synergies between creatures and spells in the Simic colors to quickly overwhelm the opponent with aggressive plays. By combining powerful creatures like Brightglass Gearhulk and Craterhoof Behemoth with support cards such as Nature's Rhythm and Soul-Guide Lantern, the deck aims to gain board control and deal significant damage early in the game. With a mix of ramp, removal, and creature buffs, this deck is designed to maintain pressure and tempo throughout the match, forcing the opponent to react to its fast-paced strategy.

This mono green aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with low cost creatures and efficient removal spells. The deck relies on building a strong board presence early on and using cards like Mightform Harmonizer to pump up its creatures for a powerful attack. Cards like Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Royal Treatment provide additional threats and removal options, while cards like Escape Tunnel and Fabled Passage help with mana fixing and card draw. Overall, this deck aims to outpace the opponent and end the game quickly before they can stabilize.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with a variety of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells. By utilizing low-cost creatures like Spyglass Siren and Floodpits Drowner, as well as powerful spells like Requiting Hex and Shoot the Sheriff, the deck aims to maintain pressure on the opponent while controlling the board. The inclusion of cards like Phantom Interference and Soulstone Sanctuary provide additional disruption and protection for your creatures. With a mix of aggression and control elements, this Dimir Aggro deck aims to quickly secure victory by outmaneuvering the opponent.

This deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures and instant/sorcery spells to quickly deal damage to the opponent. By playing cheap spells and creatures, it aims to overwhelm the opponent early in the game. The inclusion of cards like Burst Lightning and Stormchaser's Talent allows for direct damage to be dealt, while creatures like Elusive Otter and Drake Hatcher provide strong attacking capabilities. Multiversal Passage and Sleight of Hand help with card draw and mana fixing, ensuring a consistent flow of resources throughout the game. Overall, the deck aims to win through fast and efficient aggression.

This deck focuses on utilizing aggressive creatures and ramp cards to quickly build a board presence and overwhelm the opponent. With efficient ramp cards like Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, the deck aims to quickly deploy threats like Mossborn Hydra and Sazh's Chocobo to apply pressure. Cards like Royal Treatment and Mightform Harmonizer provide additional support to enhance the deck's overall aggro strategy. The addition of escape cards like Escape Tunnel and flexible removal options like Promising Vein and Ba Sing Se allows for adaptability in different matchups.

The main focus of this Mono Green Aggro deck is to quickly establish a strong board presence through efficient creature plays and ramping with cards like Llanowar Elves. As the game progresses, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures like Mossborn Hydra and Surrak, Elusive Hunter. Earthbender Ascension and Mightform Harmonizer provide additional support, while Escape Tunnel offers protection for key creatures. The deck's strategy revolves around aggressive plays and capitalizing on the synergy between its creatures and spells to pressure opponents and secure victory.

This Mono Green Aggro deck focuses on summoning powerful creatures quickly and overwhelming the opponent. With cards like Esper Origins and Mossborn Hydra, the deck aims to establish board control early on. Cards like Ba Sing Se and Mightform Harmonizer help buff up your creatures for a strong offensive push. Fabled Passage and Llanowar Elves provide mana ramp to play your bigger creatures faster. Escape Tunnel allows for surprise attacks and evasion. Overall, the deck aims to put pressure on the opponent and win through quick and aggressive plays.

The strategy of this deck is to control the game by using a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and card draw to stay ahead of the opponent. Cards like Abandon Attachments and Get Out help to disrupt the opponent's game plan, while Eddymurk Crab and Hearth Elemental provide solid blockers and threats. Riverpyre Verge and Multiversal Passage help to ensure consistent mana fixing, while Burst Lightning and Winternight Stories offer versatile removal options. Overall, this deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent through efficient control and resource management.

This deck focuses on quickly filling up the graveyard with powerful creatures, then using spells like Requiting Hex and Insatiable Avarice to bring them back onto the battlefield. The key strategy is to outvalue and overwhelm the opponent by consistently reanimating threats and disrupting their game plan with cards like Duress and Deadly Cover-Up. The combo potential is high with cards like Day of Black Sun and Stock Up to generate advantage. The deck aims to control the game with efficient removal and powerful reanimation effects to secure victory.
